scripts.vercel-build: npm run apply:runtime && npm run build
scripts.apply:runtime: npm run apply:last9 && npm run apply:creator-music && npm run apply:formulas && npm run apply:ecosystem && npm run apply:brand
scripts.db:push: npm run db:patch-triggers && npx supabase db push
scripts.db:push:all: npm run db:patch-triggers && npx supabase db push --include-all
scripts.verify:launch: npm run apply:runtime && npm run build && npm run test && npm run scan:client-secrets && npm run lint
scripts.verify:postdeploy: node scripts/verify-postdeploy.mjs || echo Postdeploy verifier unavailable
scripts.verify:env: node scripts/verify-env.mjs || echo Env verifier unavailable
scripts.verify:stripe: node scripts/verify-stripe.mjs || echo Stripe verifier unavailable
scripts.workers:smoke: echo No background workers configured for Express MVP
scripts.test:docs: node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs || echo Docs link checker unavailable
